name: cpig-bool-refactor-01-union-libfive
description: CPigUnion of two libfive primitives (sphere + sphere). Exercises the LIBFIVE FAST PATH in field_binary_impl (implicit_field.cpp:738 — both operands libfive → libfive_tree min composition → Kind::LIBFIVE result, NOT Kind::UNION). Phase 1 left this path unchanged; Phase 2's SINGLE_LEVELSET mode is opt-in and CPig.Rhino's RedisplayFields still passes AUTO, so the export still emits ONE libfive ImplicitFunction LevelSet. WaitForPenumbraFrame after each step gates real frame presentation.

checkpoints.name: union-libfive
checkpoints.description: Union of two CPig SDF spheres at +/-15,0,0 (peanut shape). Both operands libfive → composed via libfive tree min → ONE tape atom.
